message:
✨ Filter localhost dev traffic from analytics dashboard (#2195)

- Add ?filter=production (default) / ?filter=all query param to analytics API
- Wrap all 19 GA4 queries with NOT(deployment_type=localhost) exclusion filter
- Use separate blob cache keys per filter mode
- Add 'Include localhost' toggle checkbox to analytics.html header
- Show filter mode label in cache status (production only / all traffic)
- Toggle triggers immediate reload with force refresh

Localhost traffic from Vite HMR inflates user counts ~400x (1,943 vs 5 real
users). Default to production-only view for accurate metrics.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
